entries.reason: Default cleaning mode still keeps a Python legacy fallback when Rust v2 execution is unavailable or returns an execution error.
entries.success_metric: shadow compare mismatch rate and rust error rate stay below release thresholds across consecutive release audits
entries.kill_condition: default cleaning mode no longer depends on Python legacy fallback for normal release traffic

entries.scope: workflow import and normalization compatibility path
entries.reason: Historical workflow payloads still include unversioned graph samples that must be migrated into versioned workflow_definition inputs.
entries.success_metric: new saves, versions, templates, and runs only persist workflow_definition with explicit version
entries.kill_condition: unversioned workflow imports are rejected on the main path after migration backlog reaches zero

entries.scope: desktop base_api execution fallback to offline_local/offline_fallback mode
entries.reason: Desktop still supports an automatic local recovery path when base_api execution fails and offline cleaning remains available.
entries.success_metric: base_api execution has an explicit retry or fail-closed path without automatic mode mutation
entries.kill_condition: automatic offline_fallback mode is removed or replaced by explicit operator choice
